# OpenAI Codex — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | — | Not a data source |
| [[email-verification]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | Gmail plugin writes emails in user's voice based on historical email patterns; learns communication style from Gmail history; can generate full email campaigns via plugins |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | Can build campaign logic programmatically; not a sending platform |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | Gmail plugin consolidates inbox; finds emails needing attention; drafts replies in user's voice; reads surrounding conversation and thread context |

## Vendor Type
AI coding and automation tool. Similar positioning to Claude Code but with stronger Gmail plugin integration out of the box.

## Best For
Users already in the OpenAI ecosystem who want Gmail-native reply drafting and personalisation with minimal setup via the Codex Gmail plugin.

## Limitations
- Not a sending platform
- Campaign sequencing requires pairing with an outreach tool
- Prospecting and verification require additional tools
- API pricing applies for model calls
